expectations.evidence: The review uses exact KWCAG2.2 item numbering (1-33), Korean item names matching the reference document (e.g., '적절한 대체 텍스트 제공', '자막 제공', '콘텐츠의 선형 구조'), the classification system defined in the skill (✅/❌/⚠️/➖/🔵 판정불가), and auto-detection levels (정적분석/판정불가). This level of alignment with the reference document strongly indicates it was read. The with_skill run was instructed to use the skill which mandates reading kwcag22.md.

expectations.text: Analyzes all 3 target files (index.html, dashboard.tsx, Card.tsx)
expectations.evidence: The review header explicitly lists all 3 files: 'features/web-sample/pages/index.html', 'features/web-sample/pages/dashboard.tsx', 'features/web-sample/components/Card.tsx'. Findings reference specific lines in all three files (e.g., index.html:30, dashboard.tsx:29-31, Card.tsx:24-30).

expectations.text: Evaluates all 33 KWCAG2.2 items — none skipped
expectations.evidence: The summary table at the end lists all 33 items numbered 1-33, each with a result. The verification checklist confirms '33개 KWCAG2.2 항목 전수 평가 완료'. Counts: 15 준수 + 8 위반 + 4 권고 + 3 해당없음 + 3 판정불가 = 33.
Uses ✅ (준수), ❌ (위반), ⚠️ (권고), ➖ (해당없음), 🔵 (판정불가) consistently throughout. Summary table shows: ✅ 준수 15, ❌ 위반 8, ⚠️ 권고 4, ➖ 해당없음 3, 🔵 판정불가 3.

Dedicated '시맨틱 HTML 검토' section present with two subsections: '직접 탐지 가능 패턴' (3 items) and '맥락 판단 필요 패턴' (8 items), covering landmarks, section structure, interactive elements, list structure, form grouping, quotations, and time/date.

expectations.text: Each ❌ finding includes filename and line reference
expectations.evidence: All 8 ❌ findings include file:line references: Item 1 (index.html:30, dashboard.tsx:29-31), Item 10 (Card.tsx:24-30), Item 17 (index.html), Item 23 (dashboard.tsx:29-31, 34-36), Item 32 (Card.tsx:27, dashboard.tsx:45-46), Item 33 (Card.tsx:24-30, dashboard.tsx:29-36). Summary table also includes file:line for each violation.
